title: Cinematic Trailer (Epic)
summary: Epic 90s trailer build - taikos, brass stabs, choir swells, big braam climax.
prompt: An epic cinematic film-trailer score, 90 seconds of escalating tension. Starts with sparse low piano and string drone, builds with rising cellos and pulsing taiko drums, dramatic brass stabs at the climax, choir "aah" swells, big braam hits. Modern hybrid-orchestra trailer style with deep low brass and percussive bombast. Triumphant, awe-inspiring.
